steps.title: Understand vertical shift notation
steps.content: When a graph shifts up by $k$ units, each output value increases by exactly $k$.

steps.title: Apply the shift to f(x)
steps.content: We're shifting $f(x) = 3x^5$ up by 9 units, so: $$g(x) = f(x) + 9 = 3x^5 + 9$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
